privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic WordPress Application Password named 'MobileApp_iOS' and saving it to '/home/ga/mobile_api_credentials.txt'. It also requires creating a private post titled 'App Configuration Endpoint' containing a JSON payload with 'app_version' set to '2.4.1'. All these parameters are synthetically generated and explicitly required by the task instructions and evaluation scripts.
